findings.summary: UART bus correctly detected between STM32G081 and CP2102N USB-UART bridge
findings.details: The analyzer correctly identified USART_RX and USART_TX nets shared between U3 (STM32G081RBT6) and U4 (CP2102N-A02-GQFN24). This is the primary debug/programming UART between the MCU and the USB-to-serial bridge. The USB differential pair (USB_D+/USB_D-) detection with ESD protection (U2=USBLC6-2SC6, U4=CP2102N) is also correct.

findings.summary: 4-layer PCB correctly identified with inner power planes In1.Cu and In2.Cu
findings.details: The analyzer correctly reports a 4-layer board (F.Cu, In1.Cu, In2.Cu, B.Cu) with In1.Cu and In2.Cu both typed as 'power' layers. This matches the design intent for a cartridge PCB with dedicated power planes. Board dimensions (91.567 x 43.434 mm) are consistent with a Sega Genesis/Mega Drive cartridge PCB. All 192 vias and 1501 track segments are present with routing_complete=true.
